items.title: Can also confirm Caleb Love has also agreed to a two-way contract with the Sixers via a league source, meaning I’m now outnumbered during locker room periods when it comes to the Sun Devils-Wildcats rivalry (also Dalen Terry) 👿

items.title: We have exercised the team options on Dominick Barlow and Dalen Terry.
items.author: Philadelphia 76ers
items.body_excerpt: We have exercised the team options on Dominick Barlow and Dalen Terry.

items.title: Can confirm via a league source that the Sixers are picking up the team options for Dominick Barlow ($3.4 million) and Dalen Terry ($2.6 million) for the 2026-27 season. They also must make a team option decision on Trendon Watford ($2.8 million) by the end of today.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt: Can confirm via a league source that the Sixers are picking up the team options for Dominick Barlow ($3.4 million) and Dalen Terry ($2.6 million) for the 2026-27 season. They also must make a team option decision on Trendon Watford ($2.8 million) by the end of today.

media.title: Report: Sixers accept Dalen Terry's $2.5 million team option
media.description: Dalen Terry averaged 4.1 points, 1.6 rebounds, 1.6 assists and 12.4 minutes across 14 games for the Sixers in 2025-26.
